name: Sigurd
description: Sigurd is a Sylph warrior in the VRMMORPG «ALfheim Online». He lost to Lyfa in the Sylph tournament yet he still retained high ambitions to hold power among the Sylph. He later tries to betray the Sylph to the Salamander. He is later caught and exiled by Sakuya, after the botched assassination attempt.   (Source: Wikipedia)
